creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Jim, 

There are two ways to make sure you always have the most up-to-date 
version of the zoneinfo database on your FreeBSD machines: 

- Install the port misc/zoneinfo. 
- Follow the STABLE version of FreeBSD instead of the release version. 

misc/zoneinfo and 6-STABLE, 7-STABLE and 8-STABLE are currently up 
to date with tzdata2010j. 

Afterwards, don't forget to run tzsetup to make sure you install 
the latest version! 

Edwin
